name: compressed summary hides contradiction
visible_only_effect: The compressed summary says v2.0 was sufficient and strict hash checking was optional.
full_lineage_effect: Contradiction ref C-001 preserves that S-006 conflicts with S-004.
expected_handling: Do not accept the compressed summary as authoritative without contradiction arbitration.

name: stale assumption conflicts with current runtime
visible_only_effect: Schema 1.0 and unset hash seed remain plausible.
full_lineage_effect: Temporal ref T-002 marks schema 1.0 stale and runtime profile validator-v2.1 current.
expected_handling: Correct stale runtime assumptions before replaying the pass condition.

name: omitted-range removes critical recovery event
visible_only_effect: The visible replay jumps from failed retry to final pass.
full_lineage_effect: Omitted-range ref O-001 identifies the recovery window and its required refs.
expected_handling: Reconstruct the omitted range as unresolved in visible-only mode and recover it in full-lineage mode.

name: conflicting authority source
visible_only_effect: The stale maintainer note competes with current runtime configuration without ranking.
full_lineage_effect: Authority ref A-002 ranks runtime_config.json above the stale note.
expected_handling: Use authority lineage to avoid stale-source persistence.

name: retry path diverges from original attempt
visible_only_effect: Retry attempts collapse into one repair path.
full_lineage_effect: Recovery ref R-001 records that Retry A was abandoned and Retry B began.
expected_handling: Preserve retry divergence and recovery continuity.

name: environment dependency changes outcome
visible_only_effect: Final pass appears detached from runtime profile and hash settings.
full_lineage_effect: Runtime hashes bind the pass to validator-v2.1, schema 1.1, and PYTHONHASHSEED=0.
expected_handling: Bind pass/fail outcome to runtime dependency.

name: summary simplification weakens replay fidelity
visible_only_effect: The post-retry summary says the repair was simple and hides causal dependencies.
full_lineage_effect: Compression warning C-002 marks summary loss of authority, temporal, and recovery refs.
expected_handling: Treat simplified summaries as lossy replay inputs.

name: replay reconstruction attempted after lineage loss
visible_only_effect: Missing direct event bodies force unresolved gaps.
full_lineage_effect: Recovery ref R-002 and runtime hashes reconstruct operational facts while preserving missing raw body limits.
expected_handling: Recover bounded operational facts without inventing missing raw bodies.
